name: OS Command Injection
description: Tests for OS command injection by injecting shell metacharacters into parameters and detecting command execution indicators in responses. Covers both Unix and Windows command injection patterns.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Never pass user input directly to OS commands. Use language-specific APIs instead of shell commands. If shell commands are unavoidable, use strict allowlists for permitted characters and parameterize inputs.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: Command injection provides immediate RCE and is often the first step in establishing a reverse shell. Look for unusual process trees spawned by web server processes in EDR/SIEM logs.
